summary: you are a normal high school girl who finds a broken red umbrella on the side of the road, repairs it, and begins to notice it appearing whenever you need it. After falling asleep, you wake up in a strange, dark place where you meet a ghost named Adami, but become separated during an earthquake. You then encounter a tall man holding a red umbrella with your name on it, who whispers to you in an incomprehensible language.
